visual_description: The video opens with a close-up of a dark, metallic surface with reflective highlights, possibly part of a vehicle or machinery. It transitions to a nighttime urban scene featuring illuminated streetlights, trees, and multi-story buildings with some windows lit. No people are visible in the frames.
